meta.title: SpeakMove — Speaking practice for UK immigrants
meta.description: Train the conversations you avoid: landlord, GP, work coach, school, bank, interview. By voice, inside Telegram. 15 minutes a day. £7.45/mo, 7-day free trial without a card.

items: 7 UK scenarios
15 min a day
Feedback in RU / UA

hero.description: An AI partner that plays landlord, GP, work coach or HR. Voice dialogues in Telegram. Feedback in Russian or Ukrainian.

messages.text: Hello, Riverside Surgery. How can I help you today?
Hi, I want to book appointment because my back hurts since one week.
Almost! 'I want to book' → 'I'd like to book' (more polite). And use 'for' with durations: 'for a week'.
Hi, I'd like to book an appointment. My back has been hurting for a week.
Of course. Is the pain getting worse, or staying the same?

advantages.title: Not Duolingo. Not Speak. Not a tutor.
advantages.subtitle: Functional practice on the specific situations of UK life — not general 'English'.

tiles.title: Voice, not text
tiles.description: Speaking is your weak point, so the whole product is voice. The bot speaks in a British accent, you reply by voice.

tiles.title: 7 UK life scenarios
tiles.description: Landlord, GP, work coach, your child's school, bank, job interview, small talk. The conversations that actually happen to an immigrant in the UK.

tiles.title: Feedback in your native language
tiles.description: The bot explains the mistake in Russian or Ukrainian — clear what to fix and why.

tiles.title: Right inside Telegram
tiles.description: No app, no signup form. Open the bot — and speak. 2 minutes to start.

tiles.title: Transparent pricing
tiles.description: £7.45 per month. 7 days free, no card. Cancel anytime in one click or via support.

howItWorks.title: Three steps. 15 minutes. Right inside Telegram.
howItWorks.subtitle: The cycle repeats 5–8 times per session. No grades, no stress, no 'right answers'.

steps.title: Pick a scenario
steps.description: From 7 UK life situations, pick what's burning right now — landlord, GP, work coach, school.

steps.title: Listen to a voice message
steps.description: The bot sends a phrase in English at real British pace. Replay as many times as you like.

steps.title: Reply by voice
steps.description: Your pace, with mistakes — that's normal. Nobody is grading you.

steps.title: Get feedback in your language
steps.description: Within 5–10 seconds — a short correction in Russian or Ukrainian. Then the dialogue continues.

finalCta.title: Open the bot. Try one scenario.
finalCta.subtitle: 2 minutes to start. 15 minutes for the first session. Then up to you.
finalCta.meta: 7 days free · No card · Cancel in one click or via support

footer.tagline: Voice English practice on UK scenarios. V0 — early version. Direct line to me in Telegram.
footer.legalEntity: Operator: Dmytro Fenko, UK sole trader, trading as SpeakMove. Registered with the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) as a data controller, registration number ZC141876 (verify at ico.org.uk). Contact: hi@speakmove.app.
footer.researchNotice: SpeakMove is currently V0 (early version). Depending on V0 test results the legal form may change (UK Ltd) — we'll notify by email or in TG in advance.

lines.text: You put off the GP appointment because you don't know how to describe the symptoms.
You cross the street when a neighbour wants to chat about the weather.
On a job interview you give shorter answers than you could — afraid you'll trip over a phrase.
You stay quiet in a work coach meeting and nod, even when you don't understand.

painMirror.bridge: It's not your character. It's a skill you can train. 15 minutes a day, by voice, on the situations that actually happen to you.
painMirror.botReply: We train this exactly — pick where to start

scenariosGrid.title: Practise the conversations that actually happen to an immigrant in the UK.
scenariosGrid.subtitle: Every scenario is its own topic in the bot. Tap one — and it opens straight on that topic.

cards.title: Phone call with landlord
cards.hook: Call about broken heating, the tap, or a rent increase.

cards.title: GP appointment
cards.hook: Describe symptoms, ask for a referral, answer questions.

cards.title: Job interview
cards.hook: Tell me about yourself, your experience, why this role.

cards.title: Small talk with a colleague
cards.hook: Weekend plans, weather, sport — the stuff you stay quiet about.

cards.title: Call to bank or government
cards.hook: HMRC, council tax, DWP, lost card — formal calls with security checks.

cards.title: Parents evening
cards.hook: Talk about your child's progress, what to improve, how to help at home.

cards.title: Work coach at Jobcentre
cards.hook: What you searched, which applications — without risk of sanctions.

founders.title: We're Dima and Katya. Same pain as you.
founders.subtitle: We trained with a tutor too. On lessons it went fine. With real British speakers — another story.

cards.name: Dima
cards.story: Moved to the UK in 2022. Spent a year with a tutor — conversations flowed in lessons, it felt fine. But a real Brit speaks at a different pace, with a different accent, and doesn't wait for you to think. I still get lost when the speaker changes — you get used to one person, then you're back to zero with the next. That's why I'm building SpeakMove.

cards.name: Katya
cards.story: Moved to the UK in 2022 with Dima. With my tutor I spoke freely, felt I was progressing. Then I went to a parents evening — the teacher spoke faster, I lost the thread, kept asking her to repeat, and felt embarrassed. With every new British person it's as if I'm starting from scratch.

pricingCard.subtitle: 7 days free, no card required. 60 minutes of voice practice per week. All 7 scenarios.

meta.title: How SpeakMove works — Voice training on UK scenarios
meta.description: 15 minutes of voice conversation a day. 7 scenarios for UK immigrants. Feedback in Russian or Ukrainian. Right in Telegram, no app.

hero.title: 15 minutes of voice conversation a day. On the situations that actually happen to an immigrant in the UK.
hero.description: A voice AI partner inside Telegram. No app, no signup form. Just open the bot and speak.

flow.title: One cycle is two minutes. A session is 5–8 cycles.
flow.subtitle: You won't learn the language in one session. But in 30 sessions you'll notice one or two specific situations have stopped scaring you.

steps.title: Open the bot, pick a scenario
steps.description: `/start` → a menu of 7 topics → tap GP, landlord, work coach or whichever is burning right now.

steps.title: The bot sets the context
steps.description: "You're at GP reception. Goal: book an appointment for your back pain." You know who you are, where you are and why.

steps.title: The bot sends a voice message
steps.description: An English phrase, real pace, real British accent. Replay as many times as you like.

steps.title: You record a reply
steps.description: By voice, in English. With mistakes — that's normal. Your pace, nobody's rushing you.

steps.title: See the transcript
steps.description: What got transcribed from your speech. You can fix typos or replay before sending.

steps.title: Feedback in your language + next line
steps.description: A short correction in Russian or Ukrainian (1–2 lines), then the bot continues the dialogue.

messages.text: Hello, Riverside Surgery. How can I help you today?
Hi, I want to book appointment because my back hurts since one week.
Good! 'since one week' → 'for a week'. And usually people say 'I'd like to book' — sounds more polite.
How long have you had this pain — is it constant?

privacy.title: Transparent — how 15 minutes works.
privacy.subtitle: No hidden rules. No 'fair use' in small print.

cards.title: Time counts only when you speak
cards.description: Listening to the bot doesn't count. Re-recording a phrase doesn't count either. No surprises.

cards.title: Free trial — 15 minutes over 7 days
cards.description: One pool of minutes across all 7 scenarios. On Pro it's 60 minutes per week, reset every Monday.

cards.title: Pause on the fly
cards.description: If you stop mid-session, the timer stops. You'll continue tomorrow, minutes won't burn.

cards.title: Voice recordings deleted in 24h
cards.description: Audio is transcribed and deleted. The transcript is kept for your progress — you can delete it in /settings.

cards.title: GDPR-compliant
cards.description: Data isn't shared with third parties. Full deletion on request — one email to hi@speakmove.app.

cards.title: This is V0
cards.description: Early version. Not every scenario is perfectly polished, bugs are possible. Direct line to me in TG — message me, I'll fix it.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Don't see yours? Message me, I'll reply personally.

items.question: What's the 7-day free trial without a card?
items.answer: 7 days of access to all 7 scenarios + 15 minutes of voice conversation. No card to add. When the trial ends, just don't buy a subscription.

items.question: How are 60 minutes a week counted?
items.answer: Only the time **you speak**. Listening to the bot doesn't count. Re-recording a phrase doesn't count either. The limit resets every Monday.

items.question: What language is the feedback in?
items.answer: Russian or Ukrainian — you choose when you first launch the bot. You can change it in /settings.

items.question: How do I cancel?
items.answer: In **one click** in Telegram settings. Or message support — I'll reply personally.

items.question: What if I don't like it after 3 days of the trial?
items.answer: Just don't subscribe. No card on file, nothing will be charged. Feel free to message me what didn't work — it matters.

items.question: Supported currencies?
items.answer: Charged in GBP via Stripe. Stripe converts automatically from your card — works with EU and UK cards.

items.question: How are voice recordings secured?
items.answer: Recordings are transcribed and **deleted within 24 hours**. We keep the transcript for your progress — you can delete it in /settings.

items.question: What about my data?
items.answer: GDPR-compliant. We don't share with third parties. Delete request — one email to hi@speakmove.app.

items.question: Does the bot understand a Slavic accent in English?
items.answer: Yes. Trained across many accents. If something is mis-transcribed, you'll see the transcript and can replay.

items.question: This is V0 — what does that mean?
items.answer: Early version. Not every scenario is perfectly polished, bugs are possible. Direct line to me — message in TG and I'll fix it.

finalCta.title: 7 days free. No card.
finalCta.subtitle: If it doesn't land, just don't subscribe. No card on file, nothing will be charged.

unitEconomics.title: Where your £7.45 goes.
unitEconomics.subtitle: Not marketing speak, not investor premium. Honest breakdown.
unitEconomics.bottomLine: At full usage about £1.45 goes to us — for development, support and time. If you use less than max, the margin is higher. This is V0, the margin is realistically thin, and we're not pretending we're profitable now.

comparison.title: Why £7.45 is a fair price for speaking practice.

blocks.name: Tutor
blocks.note: 4 sessions a month = £60-80. High quality, but only at scheduled times.

blocks.name: Speak app
blocks.note: General AI conversation. Won't teach you "council tax" or "claimant commitment".

blocks.name: SpeakMove
blocks.note: 8× cheaper than a tutor, half of Speak. UK scenarios only, voice only.

comparison.closingLine: We're not better than a tutor, and not better than Speak. We're different — functional practice on the specific situations of UK life. When you need to call your landlord or visit the GP, a tutor can't help in the moment. We can.

meta.title: Privacy policy
meta.intro: What we store, why, and how you can delete your data.
meta.description: SpeakMove privacy policy: what data we store, why, who processes it and how you can delete it. GDPR-compliant.

sections.heading: Who is the data controller
body: **Dmytro Fenko**, UK sole trader, trading as **SpeakMove**. Address for service of documents: Weston-super-Mare, UK, BS23 1RH.
Registered with the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) as a data controller. Registration number **ZC141876** — verify at ico.org.uk.
Data contact: **hi@speakmove.app**.

sections.heading: What we store
body: SpeakMove is a Telegram bot for practising spoken English. We keep a minimal data set:

items: **Telegram ID** — to link your account to your subscription and progress
**Feedback language** (Russian or Ukrainian) — picked on first launch
**Voice recordings of your replies** — processed and **deleted within 24 hours**
**Text transcripts** of your speech — kept for progress and session history, you can delete them in `/settings`
**Subscription status** — managed via Stripe (subscription id, paid_until)

body: We **don't ask** for your name, surname, address, date of birth or other personal details.

sections.heading: Why we store it
body: To deliver the service: hold the conversation, give you feedback in your native language, track progress, bill the subscription.
**Legal basis** (GDPR Art. 6): performance of a contract (subscription service) and legitimate interest (operational support of the service).

sections.heading: Sub-processors
body: Parts of your data flow through external providers so the service can work:

items: **Stripe** — subscription payment processing (UK, GDPR-compliant)
**AI provider for speech recognition** — your voice is transcribed to text for downstream processing
**AI provider for reply generation** — the transcript text is used to generate feedback and the bot's replies
**AI provider for speech synthesis** — generates the bot's English voice reply
**Telegram** — the messenger you interact with the bot through
**EU hosting provider** — for application logic and the database

body: All sub-processors are GDPR-compliant and do not use your data to train their own models. A full vendor list is available on request — write to hi@speakmove.app.

items: **Voice recordings**: up to 24 hours after receipt. Used only for transcription, deleted automatically
**Text transcripts**: until you delete them in `/settings`
**Telegram ID and subscription status**: while the account is active + 30 days after cancellation
**Billing history (Stripe)**: 7 years — required by UK tax law

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Under GDPR (Art. 15–22) you have the rights to:

items: **Access** — get a copy of all your data
**Rectification** — ask us to correct inaccurate data
**Erasure** — ask us to delete all your data (right to be forgotten)
**Portability** — receive your data in a machine-readable format
**Restriction** — ask us to restrict processing
**Objection** — object to certain types of processing

body: To exercise any of these — email **hi@speakmove.app**. We'll respond within 30 days (usually within 48 hours).
If you believe we're breaching GDPR — you can complain to the **UK ICO**: ico.org.uk/make-a-complaint.

sections.heading: Data transfers outside UK/EU
body: Some sub-processors (for example AI providers) may process data in the US or other jurisdictions. Transfers are protected by **Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs)** or UK/EU adequacy decisions.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
body: If the policy changes, we'll update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. For material changes — notification via the Telegram bot or email.
SpeakMove is currently V0 (early version). If V0 testing leads to a different legal structure (UK Ltd), we'll notify in advance.

sections.heading: Contact
body: Any privacy questions: **hi@speakmove.app**.
Or directly on Telegram: **@dmitriy**.

meta.title: Terms of use
meta.intro: The agreement between you and SpeakMove. Short, and without legal jargon where possible.
meta.description: SpeakMove terms of use: what we provide, £7.45/mo subscription, cancellation, limits, liability. UK sole trader Dmytro Fenko.

sections.heading: Who runs the service
body: **Dmytro Fenko**, UK sole trader, trading as **SpeakMove**. Address: Weston-super-Mare, UK, BS23 1RH.
Registered with UK ICO as a data controller (ZC141876). Contact: **hi@speakmove.app**.

sections.heading: What we provide
body: SpeakMove is a Telegram bot that trains your spoken English by voice on the specific situations of a UK immigrant's life (call to landlord, GP, work coach, job interview, etc.).
The service runs through the Telegram bot **@SpeakMoveBot**. The speakmove.app website is marketing, not the entry point to the service.

items: **Free trial**: 7 days of access + 15 minutes of voice practice. No card needed. If the trial ends, just don't subscribe
**Pro subscription**: £7.45 per month via Stripe. Includes 60 minutes of voice conversation per week and all 7 scenarios
Limits reset every Monday at 00:00 UTC
Price is in GBP. Stripe converts automatically from your card

sections.heading: Cancellation and refunds
body: Cancel in one click in Telegram settings, or via **hi@speakmove.app**.

After cancellation, access is kept until the end of the paid period. Pro-rata refunds are not offered — that's what the **7-day free trial without a card** is for, so you can confirm the service fits.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
body: By using SpeakMove you agree:

items: **Not to use** the service via automated scripts, bots or emulators
**Not to attempt** to reproduce or extract the AI logic or voice content for commercial purposes
**Not to publish** reproduced bot content as your own product
**Not to use** the service for harassment, spam or illegal activity

body: Breach can lead to access being blocked without a refund.

sections.heading: Service availability
body: SpeakMove is currently **V0 (early version)**. We do our best to keep the service running but **don't offer an SLA**. Downtime, bugs and scenario changes are possible.
If something breaks — message **@dmitriy** on Telegram. We aim to reply within 24 hours.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: The prompts, scenarios, bot voice content, code and site design are owned by Dmytro Fenko (SpeakMove).
**Your voice recordings and transcripts remain yours.** We use them only to deliver the service (see Privacy Policy). We don't use your data to train models.

sections.heading: Liability
body: SpeakMove is an educational tool. **We don't guarantee** that you'll speak fluently after using it — that depends on your practice and many factors.
**Do not use SpeakMove as a substitute** for a tutor with feedback, a GP in medical situations, a lawyer in legal matters, or a work coach in real meetings.
Our maximum liability is limited to the subscription amount you paid in the past 12 months.

sections.heading: Governing law
body: This agreement is governed by the laws of **England & Wales**. Disputes — in the courts of **England & Wales**.
If you are a consumer in the EU/UK, nothing in this agreement removes rights you have under your country's law.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
body: If the terms change, we'll update the "Last updated" date and send notification through the Telegram bot. Material changes take effect 14 days after notification.

meta.title: Cookies policy
meta.intro: Which cookies the landing page uses, and how to turn them off.
meta.description: Cookies on speakmove.app: only essentials for the site to work. Analytics and marketing cookies are opt-in. PECR + GDPR compliant.

sections.heading: Scope
body: This policy applies **only to the speakmove.app landing page**. The service itself runs inside Telegram, which has its own cookies — see the Telegram Privacy Policy.
**Telegram cookies aren't ours.** We don't control them and have no access to them.

sections.heading: Essential cookies (always on)
body: The site doesn't work without these:

items: **Language preference** (`NEXT_LOCALE`) — remembers your chosen language (RU / UA / EN)
**Cookie consent state** (`speakmove_cookie_consent`) — remembers your consent choice so the banner isn't shown again

body: Retention: up to one year. Not shared with third parties.

sections.heading: Analytics and marketing (opt-in)
body: **Right now in V0 we don't use any analytics or marketing cookies.** No Google Analytics, no Meta Pixel, no TikTok Pixel — yet.
When we add them, they will **only load after explicit consent** via the cookie banner. Until consent — no tracking scripts on the page.

sections.heading: Withdrawing consent
body: Currently there's nothing to withdraw, but once analytics cookies exist:

items: Clear site cookies in your browser settings — on next visit the cookie banner will reappear
You can also set browser-level Do Not Track — we respect it

sections.heading: PECR and GDPR
body: Under **UK PECR** and the **EU ePrivacy Directive**, non-essential cookies require explicit opt-in. We follow this.
Under **GDPR** your consent is granular (by category), revocable (you can withdraw), informed (we explain why).

sections.heading: Questions
body: For cookies, analytics or your rights: **hi@speakmove.app**.
